name: Direct road via Gajraula–Moradabad–Rampur–Rudrapur–Haldwani/Kathgodam
time_class: approximately 7–9 hours to Haldwani/Kathgodam before hill continuation
notes: Live router, winter fog and driver-hours must be checked.

name: Drive to Moradabad then rail to Kumaon
time_class: schedule-dependent; driving burden lower but transfer/wait can erase gains
notes: Not demonstrated faster than continuous car.

name: Mathura Cantt–Kasganj–Bareilly–Ramnagar rail lead
time_class: long and limited-frequency; exact day alignment required
notes: Ramnagar arrival is not the same as Haldwani/Kathgodam for Dwarahat/Almora.

name: Mathura–Kasganj–Bareilly–Lal Kuan/Haldwani road or fragmented rail
time_class: several hours; no current through-rail superiority established
notes: Do not count unfinished Bareilly–Haldwani expressway.

name: Return to Delhi then New Delhi–Kathgodam Shatabdi
time_class: about 5.5 hours train plus Vrindavan–Delhi backtrack and transfer
notes: Can be attractive for comfort, not currently the fastest continuous route.
